executeSQLs: CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS flask_demo;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `Counters` (`id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `count` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, PRIMARY KEY (`id`)) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `courses` (`id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `name` varchar(200) NOT NULL, `teacher` varchar(100) DEFAULT '', `classroom` varchar(100) DEFAULT '', `day_of_week` int(11) DEFAULT 0, `start_period` int(11) DEFAULT 0, `end_period` int(11) DEFAULT 0, `weeks` varchar(50) DEFAULT '', `week_type` int(11) DEFAULT 0, `semester` varchar(50) DEFAULT '', `credits` varchar(20) DEFAULT '', `course_type` varchar(50) DEFAULT '', `raw_data` text, `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, PRIMARY KEY (`id`)) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `exams` (`id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `course_name` varchar(200) NOT NULL, `exam_date` varchar(50) DEFAULT '', `exam_time` varchar(50) DEFAULT '', `location` varchar(100) DEFAULT '', `seat` varchar(20) DEFAULT '', `exam_type` varchar(50) DEFAULT '期末考试', `semester` varchar(50) DEFAULT '', `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, PRIMARY KEY (`id`)) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `evaluations` (`id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `semester` varchar(50) DEFAULT '', `category` varchar(100) DEFAULT '', `batch` varchar(200) DEFAULT '', `start_date` varchar(50) DEFAULT '', `end_date` varchar(50) DEFAULT '', `is_done` int(11) DEFAULT 0, `items_json` text, `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, PRIMARY KEY (`id`)) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `settings` (`k` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `v` text, PRIMARY KEY (`k`)) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;
